paragraph_or_text_span: SIGN IN New to ASA? Start here Skip to main content Standards and Practice Parameters

Developed By: Committee on Practice Parameters Last Amended: October 15, 2025 (Original Approval: October 21, 1986) These standards apply to all anesthesia care although, in emergency circumstances, appropriate life support measures take precedence. These standards may be exceeded at any time based on the judgment of the responsible anesthesiologist. They are intended to encourage quality patient

heading_path: Your dues are set to be paid by your organization
paragraph_or_text_span: You do not have to make a payment at this time, but you can reach out to your practice/group leader to find out when they plan to pay your dues. Email or call the ASA Support team for assistance: (630) 912-2552 or [email protected] . OK
